item.title: Sodo66 Tel [Chess]
item.itunes:title: Sodo66 Tel [Chess]
item.itunes:author: sodo66tel
item.itunes:summary:
Sodo66 Tel
(Chess)
Sodo66 Tel là nhà cái uy tín cung cấp các dịch vụ cá cược như: xổ số, đá gà, baccarat, bắn cá, cá cược thể thao... với các khuyến mãi tỷ lệ trả thưởng hấp dẫn.
Thông tin liên hệ:
Địa chỉ: 159 Hoa Lan Phường 7, Phú Nhuận, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh
Website: Sodo66.tel
[read more]

Thông tin liên hệ:
Địa chỉ: 159 Hoa Lan Phường 7, Phú Nhuận, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh
Website: Sodo66.tel

item.content:encoded:
Sodo66 Tel
(Chess)
Sodo66 Tel là nhà cái uy tín cung cấp các dịch vụ cá cược như: xổ số, đá gà, baccarat, bắn cá, cá cược thể thao... với các khuyến mãi tỷ lệ trả thưởng hấp dẫn.
Thông tin liên hệ:
Địa chỉ: 159 Hoa Lan Phường 7, Phú Nhuận, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh
Website: Sodo66.tel

item.title: Free Product Label Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Free Product Label Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Free Product Label Maker
(Office Apps)
Easy to operate label designer software generates labels for garments and products with barcode facility. Innovative barcode label designer software provides convenient solution for generating labels for small, large and medium size organization. Affordable card and label maker software facilitates to generate beautiful cards and labels for different purposes in few simple steps. Efficient and reliable identity card and label maker software provides option to save a label design into different image file formats including gif, jpeg and jpg. Expertise CD label maker software generates beautiful label designs using graphical objects including line, rectangle, text, rectangle, circle, and ellipse. Specialized CD label and discount card designer software facilitates to generate bulk labels and cards using sequential value series, random series and constant value series techniques. Efficient CD label maker software facilitates print preview option to visualize actual printing. Specially designed CD label creator software facilitates to generate barcode labels and cards using linear and 2D barcode fonts. Innovative CD label and card maker software facilitates to import a design from any windows application including MS-word, MS-excel and MS-paint. Reliable and simple ID card and CD label maker software creates card and label in few mouse clicks using card and label templates. Efficient ID card maker and CD label designer software provides option to save a design as a template for future use.Features:* Efficient and reliable CD label designer and identity card maker software provides attractive and interactive graphical interface for the windows end users.* Powerful CD label creator and business card designer software allow user to generate label and cards without any technical skill.* Innovative CD label creator software designs ID cards, tags, coupons and labels having any size and shape including rectangular and rounded rectangular efficiently.

[read more]

Free Product Label Maker
(Office Apps)
Easy to operate label designer software generates labels for garments and products with barcode facility. Innovative barcode label designer software provides convenient solution for generating labels for small, large and medium size organization. Affordable card and label maker software facilitates to generate beautiful cards and labels for different purposes in few simple steps. Specially designed CD label creator software facilitates to generate barcode labels and cards using linear and 2D barcode fonts. Innovative CD label and card maker software facilitates to import a design from any windows application including MS-word, MS-excel and MS-paint. [read more]

(Office Apps)
Easy to operate label designer software generates labels for garments and products with barcode facility. Innovative barcode label designer software provides convenient solution for generating labels for small, large and medium size organization. Affordable card and label maker software facilitates to generate beautiful cards and labels for different purposes in few simple steps. Efficient and reliable identity card and label maker software provides option to save a label design into different image file formats including gif, jpeg and jpg. Expertise CD label maker software generates beautiful label designs using graphical objects including line, rectangle, text, rectangle, circle, and ellipse. Specialized CD label and discount card designer software facilitates to generate bulk labels and cards using sequential value series, random series and constant value series techniques. Efficient CD label maker software facilitates print preview option to visualize actual printing. Specially designed CD label creator software facilitates to generate barcode labels and cards using linear and 2D barcode fonts. Innovative CD label and card maker software facilitates to import a design from any windows application including MS-word, MS-excel and MS-paint. Reliable and simple ID card and CD label maker software creates card and label in few mouse clicks using card and label templates. item.title: WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: wisp
item.itunes:summary:
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER (WNRE) is a cutting-edge mobile optimizer developed by the talented team at @wisprjct. Unlike traditional optimization tools, WNRE is specifically designed for non-rooted Android devices, offering a seamless and efficient performance boost without requiring root access. With this innovative application, users can experience enhanced device speed, improved battery life, and optimized resource management, all without compromising the integrity of their device's operating system. Whether it's clearing cache, managing background apps, or fine-tuning system settings, WNRE empowers non-rooted users to unlock the full potential of their devices and enjoy a smoother, faster, and more responsive mobile experience. Say goodbye to sluggishness and hello to peak performance with WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER.

[read more]
item.description:
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER (WNRE) is a cutting-edge mobile optimizer developed by the talented team at @wisprjct. Unlike traditional optimization tools, WNRE is specifically designed for non-rooted Android devices, offering a seamless and efficient performance boost without requiring root access. With this innovative application, users can experience enhanced device speed, improved battery life, and optimized resource management, all without compromising the integrity of their device's operating system. Whether it's clearing cache, managing background apps, or fine-tuning system settings, WNRE empowers non-rooted users to unlock the full potential of their devices and enjoy a smoother, faster, and more responsive mobile experience. Say goodbye to sluggishness and hello to peak performance with WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER (WNRE) is a cutting-edge mobile optimizer developed by the talented team at @wisprjct. Unlike traditional optimization tools, WNRE is specifically designed for non-rooted Android devices, offering a seamless and efficient performance boost without requiring root access. With this innovative application, users can experience enhanced device speed, improved battery life, and optimized resource management, all without compromising the integrity of their device's operating system. Whether it's clearing cache, managing background apps, or fine-tuning system settings, WNRE empowers non-rooted users to unlock the full potential of their devices and enjoy a smoother, faster, and more responsive mobile experience. Say goodbye to sluggishness and hello to peak performance with WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER.

[read more]

item.title: Card Designing Application [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Card Designing Application [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Card Designing Application
(Office Apps)
Easy to use ID card designing software facilitate you to craft standard, stunning, amazing, attractive, colorful and customized identification cards with photo addition facility. Reliable card maker utility provides the way to generate high quality ID cards with your fewer efforts at reasonable price. Best ID card creator program enable user to design high resolution and professional looking identification cards by enabling designing view features. Card maker application facilitate you image designing objects to craft cool looking identification cards in short span of time. Powerful and reliable card designing tool assists you to set color settings, width setting, height setting and font settings of ID cards. Freeware ID card generator program enable you to design colorful cards in fewer clicks of mouse without having you any technical skill. Professionally developed card maker tool conveniently prints designed cards through generally used printers at reasonable price. Highly interactive card designing and printing software provides the way to design standard identification cards like employee ID card, student ID card, business ID card, visitor ID card, personal ID card and similarly other useful ID cards in most affordable and convenient manner. Compatible and convenient card generator utility allows you to produce stunning, supreme quality and professional looking identification cards just in few easy steps without affecting your budget. Card designing software provides you unique color setting features to create amazing, attractive, unique, stunning, customized, colorful, high resolution and cool looking identification cards with your minimal efforts within the short span of time in most affordable manner.Extraordinary Features:*Facilitate you to produce professional looking ID cards with photo editing facility.*Provides the way to generate ID cards in various shapes as per your choice in cost effective way.*Fulfills all type of ID card needs of your

[read more]

item.title: REALME FILE MANAGER APP [File Management]
item.itunes:title: REALME FILE MANAGER APP [File Management]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
REALME FILE MANAGER APP
(File Management)
Realme ColorOS File Manager, ported for AOSP ROMs, is a feature-rich file management application designed to enhance the file management experience on custom Android ROMs based on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP).
Originally developed by Realme for their ColorOS, this file manager has been modified and optimized to work seamlessly on AOSP-based ROMs, providing users with a familiar and intuitive file management interface.

The ported version of Realme ColorOS File Manager offers a wide range of functionalities, allowing users to efficiently organize and navigate through their files and folders. With its user-friendly design, users can easily browse, search, copy, move, rename, and delete files with just a few taps.

The file manager supports various file types, including documents, images, videos, music, and more, making it convenient for users to access and manage their multimedia files. It also offers additional features such as compression and extraction of ZIP and RAR files, creating and editing text files, and the ability to share files through various methods like Bluetooth, email, or instant messaging applications.

Furthermore, Realme ColorOS File Manager for AOSP ROMs provides advanced file management options such as file encryption, hidden file support, and batch operations, allowing users to secure their files and perform actions on multiple files simultaneously.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS File Manager is a powerful and versatile tool that brings the functionality and convenience of Realme's original file manager to AOSP-based custom ROMs, enhancing the file management experience for users who prefer the flexibility and customization offered by these ROMs.
[read more]
item.description:
REALME FILE MANAGER APP
(File Management)
Realme ColorOS File Manager, ported for AOSP ROMs, is a feature-rich file management application designed to enhance the file management experience on custom Android ROMs based on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP).
Originally developed by Realme for their ColorOS, this file manager has been modified and optimized to work seamlessly on AOSP-based ROMs, providing users with a familiar and intuitive file management interface.

The ported version of Realme ColorOS File Manager offers a wide range of functionalities, allowing users to efficiently organize and navigate through their files and folders. With its user-friendly design, users can easily browse, search, copy, move, rename, and delete files with just a few taps.

The file manager supports various file types, including documents, images, videos, music, and more, making it convenient for users to access and manage their multimedia files. It also offers additional features such as compression and extraction of ZIP and RAR files, creating and editing text files, and the ability to share files through various methods like Bluetooth, email, or instant messaging applications.

Furthermore, Realme ColorOS File Manager for AOSP ROMs provides advanced file management options such as file encryption, hidden file support, and batch operations, allowing users to secure their files and perform actions on multiple files simultaneously.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS File Manager is a powerful and versatile tool that brings the functionality and convenience of Realme's original file manager to AOSP-based custom ROMs, enhancing the file management experience for users who prefer the flexibility and customization offered by these ROMs.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
REALME FILE MANAGER APP
(File Management)
Realme ColorOS File Manager, ported for AOSP ROMs, is a feature-rich file management application designed to enhance the file management experience on custom Android ROMs based on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP).
Originally developed by Realme for their ColorOS, this file manager has been modified and optimized to work seamlessly on AOSP-based ROMs, providing users with a familiar and intuitive file management interface.

The ported version of Realme ColorOS File Manager offers a wide range of functionalities, allowing users to efficiently organize and navigate through their files and folders. With its user-friendly design, users can easily browse, search, copy, move, rename, and delete files with just a few taps.

The file manager supports various file types, including documents, images, videos, music, and more, making it convenient for users to access and manage their multimedia files. It also offers additional features such as compression and extraction of ZIP and RAR files, creating and editing text files, and the ability to share files through various methods like Bluetooth, email, or instant messaging applications.

Furthermore, Realme ColorOS File Manager for AOSP ROMs provides advanced file management options such as file encryption, hidden file support, and batch operations, allowing users to secure their files and perform actions on multiple files simultaneously.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS File Manager is a powerful and versatile tool that brings the functionality and convenience of Realme's original file manager to AOSP-based custom ROMs, enhancing the file management experience for users who prefer the flexibility and customization offered by these ROMs.
[read more]

item.title: MyInsta [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: MyInsta [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: carpaxel
item.itunes:summary:
MyInsta
(Chat & Messenging)
Introducing MyInsta, a modified version of Insta loaded with exclusive features and constantly updated. It's one of the few Insta to have the Messenger update feature enabled by default (Yes, even in Europe, you can quote private messages 😉)
Some of the features MyInsta includes are:

• MyInsta Settings • Developer Options • Experiment Settings Backup • Messenger Update • Ghost Mode • Zoom on Profile Picture • Download Reels/Stories/Posts • Monet Theming

The main difference between MyInsta and other modded apps is that this one is light and not overloaded with modded features, which allows you to always be on the latest version
[read more]
item.description:
MyInsta
(Chat & Messenging)
Introducing MyInsta, a modified version of Insta loaded with exclusive features and constantly updated. It's one of the few Insta to have the Messenger update feature enabled by default (Yes, even in Europe, you can quote private messages 😉)
Some of the features MyInsta includes are:

• MyInsta Settings • Developer Options • Experiment Settings Backup • Messenger Update • Ghost Mode • Zoom on Profile Picture • Download Reels/Stories/Posts • Monet Theming

The main difference between MyInsta and other modded apps is that this one is light and not overloaded with modded features, which allows you to always be on the latest version
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MyInsta
(Chat & Messenging)
Introducing MyInsta, a modified version of Insta loaded with exclusive features and constantly updated. It's one of the few Insta to have the Messenger update feature enabled by default (Yes, even in Europe, you can quote private messages 😉)
Some of the features MyInsta includes are:

• MyInsta Settings • Developer Options • Experiment Settings Backup • Messenger Update • Ghost Mode • Zoom on Profile Picture • Download Reels/Stories/Posts • Monet Theming

The main difference between MyInsta and other modded apps is that this one is light and not overloaded with modded features, which allows you to always be on the latest version
[read more]

item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Notesnook
(Notes)
A fully open source & end-to-end encrypted note taking alternative to Evernote.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer

item.title: Spacedrive [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Spacedrive [File Management]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Spacedrive
(File Management)
Spacedrive is an open source cross-platform file explorer, powered by a virtual distributed filesystem written in Rust.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer
[read more]

(Groupware)
